free_text: The 136Xe+198Pt reaction: a detailed re-examination
Original work, where only activation measurement
with single HPGe detector was used
Sandwiched target consisting of
-3.2 mg/cm2 198Pt foil
-4.0 mg/cm2 198Pt foil
-24 mg/cm2 197Au stopper foil.
The experiment took place at the Gammasphere
facility of the Argonne National Laboratory. From 100
Gamasphere detectors, 90 operating Compton-suppressed
Ge detectors were used in this experiment
Well-calibrated Ge detector in the Center for
Accelerator Target Science Counting Laboratory was used
for out of the beam meaurement
Prompt in beam gama ray
spectrometry was used for independent yield
measurement. Activation method was used for
cumulative yield measurement.
Pulsed beam of 136Xe with spacing between accelerator
bursts of 824 ns
Two gamma-gamma-gamma histograms were constructed. One
was constructed from prompt gamma rays during the beam
burst and the second was constructed from delayed
gamma rays detected between the beam bursts.
Compiled by S.H.
Obtained from prompt in-beam measurement
Obtained from out of beam delayed gamma ray data
obtained in post beam activation measurement
Obtained from prompt and delayed gamma data
Obtained from delayed and activation measurement
Obtained from prompt and activation measurement
Obtained from prompt, delayed and activation
measurement
Origin of uncertainties not specified
Systematic uncertainty in calculation of
independent yield
Tables 1,2,3,4
